title: taraxacum lentum
intro: Taraxacum lentum, also known as the English dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion genus. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum lentum include reducing blood pressure, improving liver function, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
